news.headline: Medicare may cover Zepbound for sleep apnea, presenting an opportunity for Eli Lilly. #healthcare #Medicare #EliLilly
U.S. Steel in a tough spot as Nippon Steel merger hits roadblock. Need to choose between partnerships or cutbacks.
news.summary: A former powerhouse is currently struggling to rejuvenate a buyout by Nippon Steel. Potential partnerships might encounter difficulties as well, and pursuing independent operations could result in necessary reductions.

news.headline: Verizon recognized as a Leader by Gartner in Private Mobile Network Services, with top scores for Vision & Execution.
news.summary: Verizon has been recognized as a Leader by a report for its strong performance in both "Completeness of Vision" and "Ability to Execute." This achievement makes Verizon the sole U.S.-based service provider to receive this honor, showcasing its outstanding performance in the industry.

news.headline: Richmond American Homes to open new Riverside County community in Menifee on Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Menifee, California, the highly anticipated debut of Riverwalk Village at Town Center is set for this Saturday, January 9, 2025. Richmond American Homes of Maryland, Inc., a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc., is excited to announce the Grand Opening. This new development promises to bring a fresh perspective to the area's real estate market.

news.headline: Global Ruthenium market valued at $5.1 billion in 2023; projected to reach $7.1 billion by 2030, growing at 4.8% CAGR.
news.summary: Dublin – A new report, "Ruthenium - Global Strategic Business Report," is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global Ruthenium market reached an estimated value of US$5.1 Billion in 2023 and is anticipated to hit US$7.1 Billion by 2030, indicating a steady CAGR of 4.8% between 2023 and 2030. This detailed study offers insights into market trends, driving factors, and projections to assist businesses in making informed decisions. Ruthenium, a lesser-known member of the platinum group, is the focus of this report.

news.headline: Construction groups ask Trump to end anti-competitive rules to save $10B yearly on federal projects above $35M.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, a coalition of twenty-four construction and business organizations, including Associated Builders and Contractors, issued a letter to President-elect Donald Trump requesting the removal of President Joe Biden's rule enforcing Executive Order 14063. This rule mandates that federal construction contracts exceeding $35 million must adhere to anti-competitive and inflationary project labor agreements. The group also urged for the reversal of other Biden administration directives promoting PLA requirements on privately-funded construction projects and those supported by local and state governments. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Intermountain Primary Children's Hospital joins Children's Brain Tumor Network to speed up pediatric research, led by Dr. Samuel Cheshier and Dr. Nicholas Whipple.
news.summary: A recent announcement revealed that Intermountain Primary Children's Hospital has joined the Children's Brain Tumor Network (CBTN) as a new member institution. The CBTN, led by Dr. Samuel Cheshier and Dr. Nicholas Whipple, aims to advance research on pediatric brain tumors. This collaboration brings together experts from various institutions to work towards improving treatment and outcomes for children with brain tumors. The addition of Intermountain Primary Children's Hospital strengthens the network, which now includes a total of [insert number] member institutions dedicated to this cause.

news.headline: UN raises their 2025 China economic growth forecast to 4.8% from 4.5%.
UN Lowers 2025 Eurozone growth forecast to 1.1% from 1.3%.
UN lowers their 2025 Japan economic growth forecast to 1.0% from 1.1%.
World of Hyatt members can now earn and redeem points at The Venetian Resort Las Vegas, enjoy on-property benefits, and earn credit towards tier status and rewards when booking through Hyatt.
news.summary: Beginning today, World of Hyatt members have the opportunity to accumulate and utilize points at The Venetian Resort Las Vegas for eligible stays booked through Hyatt. They can earn credit towards achieving tier status, Milestone Rewards, and a Brand Explorer Award. Points can also be earned at select dining and shopping establishments when expenses are charged to their rooms. Elite members can access extra on-site perks. This collaboration grants World of Hyatt members greater flexibility in their options.

news.headline: UN sees central bank rate cuts boosting growth in 2025.
UN raises 2025 global economic growth forecast to 2.8% from 2.7%.
UN sees global economic growth of 2.9% in 2026.
Saalex Corporation wins GSA OASIS+ Technical & Engineering Domain Contract potentially worth $1 trillion.
news.summary: Saalex Corporation, a key player in engineering, IT, and technical services for aerospace, defense, and federal sectors, recently secured a government-wide contract with a duration of ten years. This contract has the potential to reach close to $1 trillion in value. The announcement was made on January 9, 2025, highlighting the company's significant achievement in securing this expansive and lucrative opportunity for future growth and impact within the industry.

news.headline: UN raises 2025 US economic growth forecast to 1.9% from 1.7%.
Fed's Barkin: I think the term premium is moving long rates, not inflation.
$3B lost to hacks and scams in 2024 in the crypto industry - PeckShield. Hacks made up 70% of losses, while scams accounted for 30%.
news.summary: In 2024, illicit activities in the crypto space led to over 70% of cryptocurrency losses being attributed to hacks, with scams accounting for the remaining 30%. This data was reported by a security firm specializing in digital asset protection.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin: The lack of fiscal space is a risk for future recessions.
Midearix in Texas introduces Group Purchasing Organization (GPO) focusing on emerging segments.
news.summary: A spend solutions provider, Midearix, based in Grapevine, Texas, unveiled its new group purchasing platform on January 9, 2025. This platform aims to revolutionize collective buying by concentrating on emerging growth segments and "as-a-Service" spend categories. By bridging crucial gaps in the market, the platform offers a unique approach to cost-effective purchasing.

news.headline: SBA expands 504 Loan Program, opening doors to more small businesses for quality capital. #SBA #SmallBusiness #Expansion
news.summary: Growth Corp recently announced notable enhancements to the SBA 504 Loan Program, enabling a larger number of small and medium-sized enterprises to secure high-quality, extended capital. The improvements were disclosed in Springfield, Illinois, on January 9, 2025. This update aims to provide enhanced financial support to businesses in need of long-term funding solutions.

news.headline: British Swim School founder Rita Goldberg passed away, leaving a 40-year legacy in water safety. Jan 7, 2025.
news.summary: A pioneer in water safety and swim instruction, Rita Goldberg, the founder of British Swim School, passed away on January 7, 2025, in Virginia Beach, VA. The British Swim School, a renowned provider of swimming education in North America, expressed profound sorrow at her passing. This loss signifies the culmination of Goldberg's influential work in promoting swim lessons and water safety.

news.headline: Topcon partners with PFG America to provide precision ag solutions for Deutz-Fahr tractors in the USA through PFG's extensive network.
news.summary: In Livermore, California, Topcon Agriculture revealed a key distribution deal with PFG America, the sole distributor of Deutz-Fahr tractors in the United States. PFG America, a branch of PFG Global handling Deutz-Fahr distribution in New Zealand and Australia, joins forces with Topcon in a move to expand the reach of Topcon's aftermarket technologies among farmers via PFG America's wide dealer network. This partnership signifies a notable advancement in catering Topcon’s solutions to a larger group of farmers.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin: The consumer debt burden is still well below 2018-2019.
CallRail expands partnership with Clio, including Clio Grow, for more marketing insights for law firms, helping legal professionals market confidently.
news.summary: In Atlanta, CallRail, the AI-driven lead intelligence platform, has revealed an enhanced integration with Clio, a top legal tech company. This extended collaboration now covers Clio Grow, offering law firms increased visibility into their marketing effectiveness and lead interactions. The move underscores a significant commitment to aiding legal practitioners in marketing confidently. Particularly beneficial for solo and small firm lawyers, who often face challenges in understanding the impact of their marketing efforts.

news.headline: Alphi Capital partners with Eastbay Technologies Inc. in Toronto, founded in 1999 by Jeff Ridout.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Alphi Capital, a private equity firm located in Toronto, Ontario specializing in the lower middle market, revealed its collaboration with Eastbay Technologies Inc. Eastbay, established in 1999 by Jeff Ridout, offers project consulting services. This partnership signifies a significant move for both companies as they aim to capitalize on new opportunities and enhance their market presence.

news.headline: Southwest Airlines leaders Tammy Romo and Linda Rutherford to retire from executive officer positions.
news.summary: In Dallas on January 9, 2025, it was reported that two senior executives at Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) are set to retire from their roles. Tammy Romo, the Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer, and Linda Rutherford, the Chief Administration Officer, are stepping down from their positions. Southwest Airlines Co. is a major American airline, with the retirement of these key leaders marking a significant change for the company.

news.headline: Circle donates $1M USDC to Trump’s Inauguration Committee. Stablecoin firms, incl Tether, are top US govt debt buyers.
news.summary: Stablecoin issuers such as Tether and Circle, which are overcollateralized, together rank as the world's 18th biggest purchasers of US government debt.

news.headline: Ipsos now holds Investment Grade ratings from Moody’s and Fitch, signifying financial stability and credibility.
U-Haul provides 30 days free storage at 92 LA centers for California wildfire assistance, aiding evacuees and displaced families.
news.summary: U-Haul® is aiding those affected by the fires in Greater Los Angeles by providing relief through 30 days of free self-storage and U-Box® container services at 92 Company facilities in Southern California. The Palisades and Eaton Fires have resulted in the destruction of numerous homes and the displacement of thousands of individuals, prompting this response. The Hurst and Lidia Fires are currently burning northeast of Los Angeles, alongside the Sunset Fire. U-Haul's efforts aim to assist evacuees and impacted families during this crisis.

news.headline: Caduceus Capital Partners in Nashville launches Caduceus LAUNCH accelerator for digital health startups to fast-track their growth.
news.summary: Caduceus Capital Partners from Nashville, Tennessee, has introduced Caduceus LAUNCH, an accelerator program focused on digital health startups. The initiative aims to accelerate the growth of these startups for significant impact.

news.headline: UBS shares soar to highest level in 16 years due to news of Credit Suisse fine.
Egis appointed Independent Engineer for Maryland's Purple Line LRT, one of U.S.'s largest rail P3 projects.
news.summary: In Maryland on January 9, 2025, Egis has been appointed as the Independent Engineer for the Purple Line Light Rail Transit (LRT) project. This project, which is considered one of the largest rail Public-Private Partnership (P3) initiatives ever implemented in the United States, involves Egis overseeing and evaluating the work of both the Concessionaire, Purple Line Transit Partners, and the other stakeholders involved. This project marks a significant milestone in the U.S. infrastructure sector, with high levels of investment and complex stakeholder engagements anticipated.

news.headline: Riley Permian (NYSE: REPX) declares quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share on common stock.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a $0.38 per share cash dividend for its common stock. This dividend applies to shareholders of Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. trading under the ticker symbol REPX on the NYSE American.

news.headline: Genomics company healthŌme® Inc. rebrands to Kadance Inc. in Huntsville, Alabama. Transition signifies commitment to DNA-powered health management.
news.summary: In Huntsville, Alabama on January 9, 2025, the genomics-based precision health management company known as healthŌme®, Inc. revealed its new identity as Kadance, Inc. This change reflects the firm's commitment to utilizing DNA technology for seamless health solutions.

news.headline: New CEO Séamus Lafferty appointed by Conductive Containers Inc., replacing Brad Ahlm after 1993. Private equity firm Great River Capital Partners involved.
news.summary: In Maple Grove, Minnesota, Conductive Containers, Inc. (CCI), a prominent supplier of static control packaging for electronics, high-value components, and optics, has appointed Séamus Lafferty as its new CEO and Board member. Lafferty takes over from Brad Ahlm, who held the position for nearly three decades. Back in late 2021, CCI collaborated with private equity firm Great River Capital Partners (GRCP) to undertake strategic initiatives. The transition marks a significant change for the company after Ahlm’s long tenure as CEO.

news.headline: EDF Renewables' Huck Finn Solar project, a 200 MWac/270 MWdc facility, begins operations in Dec 2024, creating 500+ jobs and aiming to generate over $14M for local communities.
news.summary: In December 2024, EDF Renewables North America revealed the Huck Finn Solar project had reached commercial operations. Constructed by EDF Renewables for Ameren Missouri, a subsidiary of Ameren Corporation, the project consists of a 200 MWac / 270 MWdc Huck Finn Renewable Energy Center now supplying electricity. The project, creating over 500 jobs during peak construction, is forecasted to bring in over $14 million in revenue for local communities.

news.headline: Analysts warn of 3 bearish factors for Bitcoin: gov't sell-offs, low liquidity, altcoin uncertainty. Risk of drop below $90K.
news.summary: Analysts are urging caution regarding Bitcoin's short-term price outlook, attributing it to various factors. Altcoin Sherpa noted a lack of buying pressure and warned about potential government sell-offs impacting Bitcoin's value. He cautioned overleveraged traders about significant losses if Bitcoin dips below $90,000, with possible drops to the mid-low $80,000s in certain scenarios. The absorption of the sell-off is uncertain, creating a precarious situation for Bitcoin. Analyst Kevin echoed Sherpa's concerns.

news.headline: ISS National Lab achieves record-breaking year with over 50 peer-reviewed articles in FY24, raising total to nearly 450.
news.summary: In the fiscal year 2024, over 50 peer-reviewed articles were published, contributing to a total of nearly 450 articles. The Kennedy Space Center in Florida reported this achievement on Jan. 9, 2025. The International Space Station (ISS) National Laboratory excelled in expanding scientific research frontiers and established a new milestone in scholarly contributions.

news.headline: $30M raised by 0G Foundation through AI node sales.
news.summary: In recent statistics, the number of coronavirus cases has reached over 5 million worldwide, with the death toll surpassing 300,000. The United States has the highest number of cases, with over 1.5 million people infected and 90,000 reported deaths. In Spain, there are over 230,000 confirmed cases, while Italy has reported over 220,000 cases. The global economy is also facing challenges, with the International Monetary Fund predicting a contraction of 3% in 2020. The pandemic has disrupted daily life and forced many countries to implement strict lockdown measures to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: New brand Maven launches in Denver for sign design, rooted in legacy and vision. Focus on excellence. #signage
news.summary: In Denver, a new brand called Maven has been launched, focusing on sign design and implementation. The company aims to excel in this field, combining a rich legacy with innovative vision. The brand is set to make a mark in the signage industry, hoping to attract attention for its commitment to excellence.

news.headline: UnisLink appoints Julie Klapstein and Christine Schuster to board, enhancing expertise in healthcare services. PHOENIX, Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: UnisLink, a prominent company specializing in comprehensive revenue cycle management services, recently announced the addition of new board members on January 9, 2025. These new members bring expertise in technology-enabled healthcare services, revenue cycle management, and clinical practice. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's offerings, particularly in value-based care software and services. With these additions, UnisLink is positioned to strengthen its presence in the industry and drive further growth.

news.headline: Bet Caddy teams up with Profound Sports & Studio Init to offer personalized live sports experience. Chicaco, Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago on January 9th, 2025, Bet Caddy revealed exciting news about forming key partnerships. The next-gen sports entertainment platform shared collaborations with Profound Sports, an investment advisory firm and tech accelerator, as well as Studio Init, a comprehensive software development studio. This move signifies a significant step in Bet Caddy's growth strategy, linking up with reputable industry players to enhance its services.

news.headline: 30-year mortgage rate hits 6.93%, highest since July. Rising borrowing costs linked to government bond yields may deter buyers and sellers.
news.summary: Interest rates for borrowing have been increasing steadily over the past few months, aligning with the rise in yields on government bonds. This trend poses a risk of reducing the number of participants in the market, as both buyers and sellers may opt to stay out due to the heightened costs.

news.headline: Tropical Smoothie Cafe introduces Dragon Fruit & Nutella Tropic Bowls to menu, available from Jan 8.Summarized: New Tropic Bowls Dragon Fruit & Nutella added to menu at Tropical Smoothie Cafe starting Jan 8.
news.summary: On January 8, 2025, Tropical Smoothie Cafe based in Atlanta introduced two new items to its Tropic Bowl menu. The Dragon Fruit Bowl and Acai Bowl with NUTELLA® are now part of the core menu offerings of the cafe. These new additions bring a fresh and exciting twist to the menu, providing customers with unique and flavorful choices.

news.headline: LVVWD partners with American Water Resources to offer affordable water line protection to homeowners in Las Vegas Valley.
news.summary: The Las Vegas Valley Water District (LVVWD) based in Las Vegas has recently partnered with American Water Resources, a subsidiary of Oncourse Company, to provide optional water line protection services to homeowners in the area. This collaboration offers a cost-effective solution for residents looking to safeguard against unforeseen and expensive water line repairs. The protection plan is available for purchase by homeowners who receive services from LVVWD. This initiative aims to provide affordable support to local homeowners in protecting their water lines.

news.headline: Innovaccer raises $275M in Series F to boost healthcare cloud. Key investors include B Capital, Banner Health, Kaiser Permanente, and M12.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Innovaccer Inc., a prominent healthcare AI company, disclosed a $275 million Series F funding round. The round comprised both primary and secondary funding and saw involvement from notable entities such as B Capital Group, Banner Health, Danaher Ventures LLC, Generation Investment Management, Kaiser Permanente, and M12. This substantial investment is earmarked to support Innovaccer in broadening its partnerships with current clients, unveiling novel AI and cloud features, and augmenting a developer ecosystem.

news.headline: HealthEC and VirtualHealth merge to create Elligint Health, combining HELIOS® platform and population health analytics.
news.summary: Elligint Health is the new entity formed by the collaboration of HealthEC and VirtualHealth in Edison, N.J. This partnership combines VirtualHealth's HELIOS® medical management platform with HealthEC's population health analytics. The goal of Elligint Health is to revolutionize healthcare by providing data-driven solutions that streamline processes and facilitate targeted interventions. This merger aims to empower healthcare organizations to succeed in the value-based care model.

news.headline: Denise Davis appointed VP of Strategy & Communications at WSPA effective Jan 13, 2025. Leading petroleum innovation efforts.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, the Western States Petroleum Association (WSPA) is excited to appoint Denise Davis as the Vice President of Strategy and Communications starting Monday, January 13, 2025. Davis will oversee WSPA’s strategic communications, supporting companies involved in petroleum exploration, production, refining, transportation, and marketing, as well as promoting progress in renewable fuels.

news.headline: Ellucian named to GSV 150 list for 5th year. Higher education AI leader. RESTON, Va., Jan. 9, 2025 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Ellucian, a tech leader in higher education, is leveraging AI technology with a focus on student well-being. The company, headquartered in Reston, Virginia, made headlines on January 9, 2025, as it was recognized on the prestigious 2025 GSV 150 list. This list acknowledges the top players in the education sector, and Ellucian's inclusion signifies its position as a key player in the market. By prioritizing students and employing innovative artificial intelligence solutions, Ellucian is at the forefront of higher education technology.
